debug_info.goal:
case some.none
𝕜 : Type u_3
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
r : ENNReal
f g : α → 𝕜
hr₀ : r ≠ 0
p : NNReal
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p) none r
⊢ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[some p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[none]

failed_attempts:
simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    have : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := hpqr.left_eq_of_right_eq_top
    rw [this]
    calc ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[r] * ‖g‖ₙ_[⊤] := by
      apply cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLinftyNorm
      exact hr₀

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    have hr : r = p := by simpa using hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv hr₀
    subst hr
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLinftyNorm _ _

simp only [ENNReal.some_eq_coe] at hpqr ⊢
    have hr : r = p := by
      have := hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv_r
      simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero] at this
      exact (ENNReal.inv_eq_inv.mp this).symm
    subst hr
    calc ‖f * g‖ₙ_[↑p] ≤ ‖f * (fun _ ↦ ‖g‖ₙ_[⊤])‖ₙ_[↑p] := by
        apply cLpNorm_mono_real
        intro a
        simp only [Pi.mul_apply, norm_mul, RCLike.norm_ofReal, abs_norm]
        gcongr
        exact cLpNorm_top_lower_bound g a
      _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[↑p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[⊤] := by simp [cLpNorm_mul_const_right]

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    have hp_eq_r : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := by
      have h := hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv
      simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero] at h
      exact ENNReal.inv_injective h
    rw [← hp_eq_r]
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLinftyNorm _ _

have hp_eq_r : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := by
      have := hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv
      simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top, ENNReal.inv_top, add_zero] at this
      exact (ENNReal.inv_eq_inv.mp this).symm
    rw [← hp_eq_r]
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLinftyNorm _ _

rw [mul_comm f g, mul_comm (‖f‖ₙ_[some p])]
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le ⊤ (some p) hr₀

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    rw [mul_comm f g, mul_comm (‖f‖ₙ_[↑p]) (‖g‖ₙ_[⊤])]
    exact @cLpNorm_mul_le α mα _ _ 𝕜 _ ⊤ ↑p r hr₀ hpqr.comm

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLinftyNorm hr₀

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top]
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm_top f g

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top]
    rw [mul_comm (‖f‖ₙ_[↑p]) _, mul_comm f g]
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le ⊤ ↑p hr₀

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at hpqr ⊢
    have : r = p := ENNReal.HolderTriple.right_top hpqr
    subst this
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLinftyEssSup _ _

simp only [ENNReal.none_eq_top] at *
    have hr : r = p := hpqr.right_eq_self hr₀
    rw [hr, mul_comm]
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLinftyNorm_mul_cLpNorm _ _

have hp_eq_r : (p : ℝ≥0∞) = r := by simpa using hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv
    rw [← hp_eq_r]
    exact cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLinftyNorm p f g
